𝗚𝗛𝗚𝗥𝗔𝗕 | To efficiently download specific assets from GitHub repositories directly from the command line, avoiding unnecessary cloning and streamlining workflows.  🔥 Super Hot!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To efficiently download specific assets from GitHub repositories directly from the command line, avoiding unnecessary cloning and streamlining workflows.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Search and download files/folders from GitHub via CLI
✅ TUI (Terminal User Interface) with fuzzy search
✅ File preview within the TUI
✅ Support for GitHub LFS
✅ Batch download mode
✅ Repo discovery and filtering
✅ Agent mode for scripting with JSON output
✅ Multiple installation methods (NPM, Cargo, pipx, Nix, AUR)


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 665 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 44 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 6 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ghgrab is a Rust-based command-line tool that provides a user-friendly terminal interface for searching and downloading specific files or entire folders from GitHub repositories without needing to perform a full `git clone`. It offers features like fuzzy search, file preview, batch downloads, and an agent mode for scripting.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/abhixdd/ghgrab

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔥 𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝘂𝘀 for daily GitHub projects!
👉 GitHub Open Source: https://t.me/GitHub_Open_Source

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a simple, self-hosted cloud storage and collaboration solution that is easy to deploy and manage, especially for users seeking a lightweight alternative to more complex platforms.
📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Single Binary Deployment
✅ No Dependencies Required
✅ High Performance (Go backend + React frontend)
✅ Real-time Collaboration (Monaco Editor)
✅ Multi-user Support with Permissions
✅ Full File Operations
✅ Chunked File Uploads
✅ Recovery Bin
✅ Storage Quota Management
✅ JWT-based Authentication
✅ Audit Logs
✅ Configurable Storage Limits

FolderHost is a self-hosted cloud platform distributed as a single, dependency-free executable. It allows users to share files, collaborate in real-time with live code editing, and manage users, offering a lightweight alternative to complex solutions like Nextcloud.

𝗦𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗥𝗬𝗦𝗘𝗔𝗥𝗖𝗛 | Finding specific moments or events within video footage using natural language queries.  🔥 Super Hot!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Finding specific moments or events within video footage using natural language queries.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Semantic search over video files (mp4)
✅ Uses Gemini Embedding 2 or Qwen3-VL for embeddings
✅ Stores embeddings in ChromaDB
✅ Splits videos into chunks for indexing
✅ Returns trimmed video clips as search results
✅ Supports both API-based (Gemini) and local model backends
✅ Configurable chunk duration, overlap, and preprocessing options


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

🍴 147 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀

SentrySearch enables semantic search over video footage. It allows users to find specific moments within videos by typing descriptive text queries, and the system returns a trimmed clip of the relevant segment.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

WinScript is an open-source Windows customization tool that allows users to debloat unnecessary applications, enhance privacy by disabling data collection, optimize performance by fine-tuning system settings, and easily install desired software using package managers like Chocolatey or Winget.
